title: 412 -- Rich task context injection to eliminate agent research overhead
result_summary: Completed: 412 -- Rich task context injection. Added TaskContextBuilder with AST parsing, dependency graphs, git co-change analysis, subsystem context. Knowledge base at .sdd/knowledge/ with file_index.json, architecture.md, recent_decisions.md. Spawner injects rich context into agent prompts. Orchestrator refreshes KB periodically and captures decisions from done tasks. Manager template updated with context_hints guidance. 29 new tests, 1580 total passing.
